title: GhostlyMorph
description: Morph to any mob and enjoy the abilities!
body:
# ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2253f5fdd41784013c9983defb933ee08aaa93d1.png)

**GhostlyMorph** is not just a morph mod — it’s a complete possession system.

When you die, you don’t respawn normally...
You become a ghost.

As a ghost, you can **possess any mob** and take full control over it — not just its appearance, but its **abilities, behavior, and movement**.

Experience Minecraft in a completely new way by becoming the creatures around you.

# ![creeper possession](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/742c41223b782fcacebc193d2032c33e94c50bc6_0.webp)

## Core Mechanics

* Die → Become a ghost 👻
* Possess any mob in the world
* Fully control the mob you enter
* Use their abilities, movement, and behavior exactly as they are

## Controls

* **Right Click** → Activate main ability
* **Sneak + Right Click** → Activate extra ability
* **Left Click** → Attack / use mob attack (melee or ranged)

## Important Rules

* To return to your human form, you must **drink milk while in ghost form (without possessing any mob)** 🥛
* Once you possess a mob, **you cannot leave it unless you die** ☠️

## What Makes It Special?

Unlike traditional morph mods, **GhostlyMorph doesn’t just change your model** —
it lets you **live inside the mob**.

Every entity feels unique:

* Become a Zombie and move like one
* Enter a Skeleton and fight with ranged attacks
* Control any mob with its real behavior system

This creates a **true immersive possession experience**.

## Why GhostlyMorph?

Most morph mods are limited to visuals or simple ability systems.

**GhostlyMorph is different.**
It was built to deliver a **clean, smooth, and fully immersive possession mechanic**.

I can confidently say that **GhostlyMorph is one of the best and most unique morph/possession mods you can try.**
